message:
fix(incident_lab): remove stray extra closing brace in validate_trace event loop

A duplicate closing brace was left at the end of the per-event validation
loop in validate_trace(), likely from a merge or rebase conflict resolution.
The extra `}` closed the for-loop body prematurely, causing the subsequent
integrity hash check (compute_trace_digest + ct_eq_bytes) and all remaining
validation to fall outside the function's intended control flow. Removing
it restores the correct structure where the integrity check executes after
all per-event validations complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
